decisions.decision: Project user submits billing_request, not direct collectible
decisions.rationale: operations_user lacks collectible write authority; Finance stays in control of actual billing

decisions.decision: Project Detail: footer link in Financial Summary Collectibles section
decisions.rationale: User selected Option C — zero card expansion

decisions.decision: Finance queue: collapsible blue banner above Collectibles table
decisions.rationale: User selected Option A — inline, auto-hides when empty
Avoids Firebase Storage / Blaze plan requirement

decisions.decision: Billing type: user-selected pills with auto-hint from tranche label
decisions.rationale: Tranche labels are free-form; cannot reliably infer type programmatically

decisions.decision: Approve extends preselectKey to include tranche_index
decisions.rationale: openCreateCollectibleModal already has preselectKey infra; extend to projects:CODE:INDEX
